name: Rusty Sword
description: A worn-out sword, barely holding its edge.

description: Slightly bent, but still usable.

name: Chipped Sword
description: Has a few chips, reducing its effectiveness.

description: Lacks sharpness, making it harder to cut through enemies.

name: Old Sword
description: An old sword, showing signs of wear and tear.

name: Practice Sword
description: A wooden sword used for training.

description: A basic iron sword, reliable and sturdy.

name: Iron Sword
description: A standard iron sword.

name: Steel Sword
description: A well-balanced steel sword.

name: Long Sword
description: A longer sword with better reach.

description: An iron sword reinforced for extra durability.

name: Curved Steel Sword
description: A curved steel sword for swift strikes.

name: Spiked Iron Sword
description: An iron sword with spikes for extra damage.

name: Broadsword
description: A heavy broadsword for powerful blows.

description: A steel longsword, strong and reliable.

name: Serpent Blade
description: A blade with a snake-like design.

name: Knight's Sword
description: A sword fit for a knight.

name: Gladius
description: A short sword used by gladiators.

description: A versatile sword that can be used with one or two hands.

description: A wavy blade that causes extra bleeding.

description: A legendary sword said to be able to slay dragons.

name: Excalibur
description: The legendary sword of King Arthur.

description: A cursed katana that thirsts for blood.

description: A runeblade that steals the souls of its victims.

description: A black sword that feeds on souls.

description: A cursed sword that corrupts its wielder.
